data.name: sqlDataSource1.ResultSchemaSerializable
data.value: 

data.name: Total_RejEggs.Expression
data.value: Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([RejBroken]) Or [RejBroken] == 0, 0, [RejBroken]) + Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([RejCrack]) Or [RejCrack] == 0, 0, [RejCrack]) + Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([RejDef]) Or [RejDef] == 0, 0, [RejDef]) + Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([RejOther]) Or [RejOther] == 0, 0, [RejOther])

data.name: CumHatchability.Expression
data.value: Iif([SR_HT_FlkSumProdReport.SettedEggs] <> 0, ([SR_HT_FlkSumProdReport.SelChicks] + [SR_HT_FlkSumProdReport.CullsChicks] + [SR_HT_FlkSumProdReport.DeadChicks]) / [SR_HT_FlkSumProdReport.SettedEggs] * 100, 0 )

data.name: TotalEggSold.Expression
data.value: Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([SoldHatEggs]) Or [SoldHatEggs] == 0, 0, [SoldHatEggs]) + Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([SoldTableEggs]) Or [SoldTableEggs] == 0, 0, [SoldTableEggs]) + Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([EggsToOffal]) Or [EggsToOffal] == 0, 0, [EggsToOffal])

data.name: StockHatEggBal.Expression
data.value: Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([BalOfHatEggs]) Or [BalOfHatEggs] == 0, 0, [BalOfHatEggs]) - ( Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([SR_HT_FlkSumProdReport.SettedEggs]) Or [SR_HT_FlkSumProdReport.SettedEggs] == 0, 0, [SR_HT_FlkSumProdReport.SettedEggs]) + Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([TotalEggSold]) Or [TotalEggSold] == 0, 0, [TotalEggSold]) )

data.name: ActHatchBalanceEggs.Expression
data.value: Iif( (IsNullOrEmpty([SetEggBalHatEgg]) Or [SetEggBalHatEgg] == 0), 0, (Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([SelChickBalHatEgg]), 0, [SelChickBalHatEgg]) + Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([CullsBalHatEgg]), 0, [CullsBalHatEgg]) + Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([DeadsBalHatEgg]), 0, [DeadsBalHatEgg])) / [SetEggBalHatEgg] * 100 )

data.name: Total_RejEggs_1.Expression
data.value: Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([RejBroken_1]) Or [RejBroken_1] = 0 Or IsNullOrEmpty([RejCrack_1]) Or [RejCrack_1] = 0 Or IsNullOrEmpty([RejDef_1]) Or [RejDef_1] = 0 Or IsNullOrEmpty([RejOther_1]) Or [RejOther_1] = 0, 0, [RejBroken_1] + [RejCrack_1] + [RejDef_1] + [RejOther_1])

data.name: CumChicks_1.Expression
data.value: Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([SelChicks_1]) Or [SelChicks_1] = 0 Or IsNullOrEmpty([CullsChicks_1]) Or [CullsChicks_1] = 0 Or IsNullOrEmpty([DeadChicks_1]) Or [DeadChicks_1] = 0, 0, [SelChicks_1] + [CullsChicks_1] + [DeadChicks_1])

data.name: CumHatchability_1.Expression
data.value: Iif( IsNullOrEmpty([SettedEggs_1]) Or [SettedEggs_1] = 0, 0, ( Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([SelChicks_1]) Or [SelChicks_1] = 0, 0, [SelChicks_1]) + Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([CullsChicks_1]) Or [CullsChicks_1] = 0, 0, [CullsChicks_1]) + Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([DeadChicks_1]) Or [DeadChicks_1] = 0, 0, [DeadChicks_1]) ) / [SettedEggs_1] * 100 )

data.name: SoldTableEggs_1.Expression
data.value: Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([ER_SoldAsTableEggs_1]) Or [ER_SoldAsTableEggs_1] == 0, 0, [ER_SoldAsTableEggs_1]) + Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([ES_SoldAsTableEggs_1]) Or [ES_SoldAsTableEggs_1] == 0, 0, [ES_SoldAsTableEggs_1])

data.name: EggsToOffal_1.Expression
data.value: Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([SR_HT_FlkSumProdReport.ER_SendToOffal_1]) OR [SR_HT_FlkSumProdReport.ER_SendToOffal_1] == 0, 0, [SR_HT_FlkSumProdReport.ER_SendToOffal_1]) + Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([SR_HT_FlkSumProdReport.ES_SendToOffal_1]) OR [SR_HT_FlkSumProdReport.ES_SendToOffal_1] == 0, 0, [SR_HT_FlkSumProdReport.ES_SendToOffal_1])

data.name: TotalEggSold_1.Expression
data.value: Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([SoldHatEggs_1]) OR [SoldHatEggs_1] == 0, 0, [SoldHatEggs_1]) + Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([SoldTableEggs_1]) OR [SoldTableEggs_1] == 0, 0, [SoldTableEggs_1]) + Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([EggsToOffal_1]) OR [EggsToOffal_1] == 0, 0, [EggsToOffal_1])

data.name: CumChicks_Act_Est_1.Expression
data.value: Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([EstChicks_PerEgg_1]) OR [EstChicks_PerEgg_1] == 0, 0, [EstChicks_PerEgg_1]) + Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([ESTChicks_PerStock_HE_1]) OR [ESTChicks_PerStock_HE_1] == 0, 0, [ESTChicks_PerStock_HE_1]) + Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([CumChicks_1]) OR [CumChicks_1] == 0, 0, [CumChicks_1])

data.name: AB_CumTotalChicksHH_VS_Act.Expression
data.value: Iif( [POL] <> 0, ( Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([CumChicks]) OR [CumChicks] == 0, 0, [CumChicks]) + Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([SelChicks_1]) OR [SelChicks_1] == 0, 0, [SelChicks_1]) + Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([CullsChicks_1]) OR [CullsChicks_1] == 0, 0, [CullsChicks_1]) + Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([DeadChicks_1]) OR [DeadChicks_1] == 0, 0, [DeadChicks_1]) ) / [POL], 0 )

data.name: AB_RejChicksHH_VS_Act.Expression
data.value: Iif( [POL] <> 0, ( Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([RejChicks]) OR [RejChicks] == 0, 0, [RejChicks]) + Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([CullsChicks_1]) OR [CullsChicks_1] == 0, 0, [CullsChicks_1]) + Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([DeadChicks_1]) OR [DeadChicks_1] == 0, 0, [DeadChicks_1]) ) / [POL], 0 )

data.name: AB_CumAGradeChicksHH_VS_Act.Expression
data.value: Iif( [POL] <> 0, ( Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([RejChicks]) OR [RejChicks] == 0, 0, [RejChicks]) + Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([CullsChicks_1]) OR [CullsChicks_1] == 0, 0, [CullsChicks_1]) + Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([DeadChicks_1]) OR [DeadChicks_1] == 0, 0, [DeadChicks_1]) ) / [POL], 0 )

data.name: AB_CumTotalChicksHH.Expression
data.value: Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([CumChicks_ActEst_HH]) OR [CumChicks_ActEst_HH] == 0, 0, [CumChicks_ActEst_HH]) + Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([CumChicks_ActEst_HH_1]) OR [CumChicks_ActEst_HH_1] == 0, 0, [CumChicks_ActEst_HH_1])

data.name: Data_2.Expression
Perf2.Expression
data.value: Iif(?IsRTL, [Performance] + ' (' + [After] + ' ' + ToStr([DaysNO]) + ' ' + [Day] + ') ' + [Data] + ToStr([SR_HT_FlkSumProdReport.LastDays]) + ' ' + [Day] + ' ' + [Only], 'Performance (After ' + ToStr([DaysNO]) + ' days) Data only ' + ToStr([SR_HT_FlkSumProdReport.LastDays]) + ' days' )

data.name: ActHatchBalanceEggs_1.Expression
data.value: Iif([SR_HT_FlkSumProdReport.SetEggBalHatEgg_1] <> 0, ([SR_HT_FlkSumProdReport.SelChickBalHatEgg_1] + [SR_HT_FlkSumProdReport.CullsBalHatEgg_1] + [SR_HT_FlkSumProdReport.DeadsBalHatEgg_1]) / [SR_HT_FlkSumProdReport.SetEggBalHatEgg_1] * 100, 0 )

data.name: SoldTableEggs_1_FromPartA.Expression
data.value: Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([ER_SoldAsTableEggs_1]) Or [ER_SoldAsTableEggs_1] == 0, 0, [ER_SoldAsTableEggs_1]) + Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([ES_SoldAsTableEggs_1]) Or [ES_SoldAsTableEggs_1] == 0, 0, [ES_SoldAsTableEggs_1])

data.name: $this.ScriptsSource
